zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mylles於1520年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾瑟格利時，她的父親Ralph Edward Mylles23歲，母親Mary Lydia Appleford21歲。她於1537年與Robert Childe結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1563年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mylles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mills
meanings: English: variant of Mill 1, with excrescent -s added in post-medieval times. Compare Mullins , from a French equivalent of this name, and see also Milnes .
English: either a variant of Miles , a variant of Mill 2, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, or Myhill , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: this is usually the English name, especially in Ulster, but elsewhere in Ireland it was also adopted for the Gaelic topographic byname, an Mhuilinn ‘of the mill’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mylles was born in 1520, in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Edward Mylles, was 23 and her mother, Mary Lydia Appleford, was 21. She married Robert Childe in 1537. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1563, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

Elle a épousé Robert Childe en 1537. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1563, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ko.Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 위스 콜레시
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mylles(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 세지리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Edward Mylles(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Lydia Appleford(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1537년 Robert Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1563년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.
